title: Baharly Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baharly with a Z-Score of +4.31. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Baharly is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 30%, while the wind speed is at 15.4 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The city is experiencing a critical level of heat stress, with no heating degree days recorded, at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
